controls.title: Identity Management and Authorization
controls.rationale: Manage identities and enforce authorization controls
controls.recommendation: Implement centralized identity management with role-based access

controls.title: MFA and Authentication
controls.rationale: Require strong authentication methods
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA for all users and privileged access

controls.title: Privilege Access Management
controls.rationale: Control and monitor privileged user access
controls.recommendation: Implement JIT access with approval workflows

controls.title: Data Classification and Handling
controls.rationale: Classify and protect data based on sensitivity
controls.recommendation: Tag all data with classification levels

controls.title: Encryption and Key Management
controls.rationale: Encrypt data at rest and in transit
controls.recommendation: Use customer-managed keys for sensitive data

controls.title: Data Retention and Disposal
controls.rationale: Manage data lifecycle and secure disposal
controls.recommendation: Implement retention policies with secure erasure

controls.title: Infrastructure Security
controls.rationale: Secure cloud infrastructure from unauthorized access
controls.recommendation: Implement network segmentation and firewalls

controls.title: Virtual Machine and Container Security
controls.rationale: Secure virtual compute resources
controls.recommendation: Enable host-based firewalls and intrusion detection

controls.title: Audit Logging and Monitoring
controls.rationale: Log and monitor all security-relevant activities
controls.recommendation: Centralize logs with alerting for suspicious activities

controls.title: Incident Detection and Response
controls.rationale: Detect and respond to security incidents
controls.recommendation: Implement SIEM with automated response capabilities

controls.title: Compliance Monitoring and Reporting
controls.rationale: Monitor compliance with security policies
controls.recommendation: Generate compliance reports quarterly

controls.title: Vulnerability and Patch Management
controls.rationale: Identify and remediate vulnerabilities
controls.recommendation: Scan for vulnerabilities monthly and patch within 30 days

controls.title: Business Continuity and Recovery
controls.rationale: Ensure business continuity and disaster recovery
controls.recommendation: Test recovery procedures semi-annually

controls.title: Shared Responsibility Model Compliance
controls.rationale: Understand and implement shared responsibilities
controls.recommendation: Document customer and provider responsibilities

controls.title: Threat Detection and Response
controls.rationale: Detect and respond to security threats
controls.recommendation: Implement threat intelligence integration with alerts

controls.title: Incident Management
controls.rationale: CSA-CCM requires incident detection and management capabilities.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender for Cloud and configure alert rules.

controls.title: Incident Reporting
controls.rationale: Incident reporting infrastructure must support timely notification.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups with notification receivers.

controls.title: Security Contact Management
controls.rationale: Security contacts must be designated for incident coordination.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with alert notifications.

controls.title: Change Management Policy
controls.rationale: Change control policies must govern cloud resource modifications.
controls.recommendation: Assign policies with deny effects for unauthorized changes.

controls.title: Change Tracking
controls.rationale: All configuration changes must be tracked and auditable.
controls.recommendation: Ensure activity logs capture Write and Delete events.

controls.title: Business Continuity Planning
controls.rationale: Business continuity plans must include backup and recovery.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Recovery Services vaults with soft delete.

controls.title: Data Resilience and Redundancy
controls.rationale: Data must be stored with geographic redundancy.
controls.recommendation: Use GRS/RA-GRS replication for storage accounts.

controls.title: Asset Inventory
controls.rationale: All cloud assets must be inventoried and classified.
controls.recommendation: Maintain comprehensive asset inventory.

controls.title: Data Classification
controls.rationale: Data must be classified and labeled appropriately.
controls.recommendation: Apply mandatory data classification tags.
